textByHash.fde3874ef51711f411eac6f243d8cb0913bef0a6: Nilsal, traveller. What brings you out here?
textByHash.24b90367383655997000dc30a702930bda50c1be: You'll find me here quite often. I like to come and tend to this grave.
textByHash.37549f365e4b3adf3dbbcec6eb646becbf90c88f: I don't know. I don't understand the markings on it. They are not of this land. All I know is that it is the grave of someone from Kourend.
textByHash.271c414deb15dc132abf655f95828208bb30a60a: They'll have been a soldier of some sorts, fighting here in the war. I'm guessing they were quite important. Very few people would have been afforded a burial in those times.
textByHash.71f2ab6e8b12640ed3a3a643d147ca61d14ef8eb: It was my father's generation who fought in the war, but they're all gone now. My generation will soon follow. In time, this grave will go as well. Eventually, they'll be no trace left of the war.
textByHash.61e73e14cdb9ae686f8b4e2ae40aa74724a863a6: I guess that's why I tend the grave. The future is inevitable, but for now, I'd like to try and hold onto the past for a bit longer.
